## AI Navigation Metadata

Check only what applies.

- [ ] Route/page entry changed
- [ ] API/query/client boundary changed
- [ ] State/cache/session ownership changed
- [ ] Package/build/test entry changed
- [ ] Domain ownership or first-read files changed
- [ ] Stale AI metadata was discovered and recovered
- [ ] Known failure pattern promoted/updated by root cause
- [ ] `AI_INDEX.md` update needed
- [ ] `.ai/indexing/maps/*` update needed
- [ ] Diff impact reviewed (`npm run diff:impact`)
- [ ] Not needed because:

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run validate:index`
- [ ] `npm run diff:impact` when this PR changes source behavior or structure
- [ ] `npm run diff-check -- --warn-only` when this PR changes source structure
- [ ] `npm run refresh:changed` when navigation metadata may be stale
